title: Iranian footballer's return exposes teammates in Australia | 7NEWS
description: Seven Iranian female soccer players sought refuge in Australia after participating in a silent protest, but one player, Mohadeseh Zolfi, has returned to Iran due to concerns for her family's safety. Her departure inadvertently exposed the location of the six remaining players, prompting their immediate relocation to a new safe house. The Iranian Football Federation has accused Australia of holding the players hostage, while the Australian government maintains the women are free to choose and has offered humanitarian visas to those who wish to stay. title: Vivid 2026 returns with drone show and daytime displays | 7NEWS
description: Vivid 2026 returns to Sydney with 43 light displays stretching six kilometres from Circular Quay to Tumbalong Park in Darling Harbour. The festival brings back the popular drone show with 22 performances over 11 nights, alongside attractions including a 23-metre tall Molecule of Light at Barangaroo, a 45-metre LED corridor called Obstacle, and projections at the Opera House and Customs House. For the first time, Vivid will feature daytime displays including interactive artworks, with the festival launching on Friday, 22nd of May. title: Sydney councils named and shamed over housing targets | 7NEWS
description: Sydney councils are being held accountable for their performance on housing development approvals, with Strathfield, Willoughby, Waverley, Hunters Hill and North Sydney approving only a third of required new developments. Under the state government's Housing Accord initiative targeting 377,000 new homes by 2029, underperforming councils will lose millions in grant funding while Canada Bay, Hawkesbury and Burwood have exceeded their targets. title: Thousands celebrate ageing at seniors expo | 7NEWS
description: Thirty-five thousand seniors attended the New South Wales Seniors Festival Expo at the ICC in Darling Harbour, the largest event of its kind in the Southern Hemisphere. The expo featured 90 exhibitors showcasing products and services for older Australians, including stair lifts, hearing aids, anti-scam protection, wheelchair access solutions, and group coach tours. Attendees also enjoyed a concert hosted by a Channel 7 newsreader and explored various lifestyle options, from social clubs to unique memorial services. title: Titanic-inspired statue of Trump and Epstein installed outside US Capitol
description: A statue of late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and US President Donald Trump has been displayed outside the US Capitol in Washington, DC. The statue shows Trump embracing Epstein on the bow of a boat, mimicking the 1997 film poster for Titanic, depicting characters Jack Dawson and Rose DeWitt Buckater.  The installation titled "King of the World,"  was by an the anonymous artist collective Secret Handshake. #Trump #statue #USCapitol #WashingtonDC #Titanic
